things.name: Panteón Nacional de los Heroes
things.description: Neo-classical pantheon modelled on the Pantheon in Paris - heart of Paraguayan patriotism

things.name: Historic Centre & Manzana de la Rivera
things.description: Colonial city blocks with restored 19th-century houses and a cultural museum

things.name: Palacio de los Lopez (Government Palace)
things.description: Neoclassical presidential palace on the riverside - the most photographed building in Paraguay

things.name: Museo del Barro
things.description: Paraguay's finest art museum with pre-Columbian ceramics, folk art and contemporary work

things.name: Botanical Garden & Zoo
things.description: Former Carlos Antonio Lopez presidential estate with a natural history museum

things.name: Areguá Strawberry Town
things.description: Colonial town on Lake Ypacarai famous for ceramics, strawberries and art galleries

things.name: Ruinas Jesuitas de San Cosme y Damian
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Jesuit reduction ruins 350km from Asuncion

things.name: Catedral Metropolitana
things.description: Simple colonial cathedral on the Plaza de la Independencia

things.name: Mercado 4
things.description: Asuncion's largest and most chaotic traditional market

things.name: Chipa and Sopa Paraguaya
things.description: Cheesy tapioca rolls and Paraguay's famous cornbread with cheese - the national foods
